entries.name: transaction-reconcile-ledger-balances
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:00 UTC. The load-bearing integrity check: for every tenant, computes SUM(debit_cents) vs SUM(credit_cents) globally per account per day + per transaction. Fires LedgerImbalanceDetected (P0) per imbalance. Also fires AccountBalanceThresholdCrossed for threshold crossings. Fires LedgerReconciliationCompleted per tenant with stats.

entries.name: transaction-generate-general-ledger-report
entries.purpose: Monthly 06:00 UTC on the 1st. Generates the per-tenant General Ledger (GL) report for the previous closed month. Delivers MonthlyLedgerReportNotification to finance-role users. Only fires for tenants with transaction_advanced_reporting entitlement.

entries.name: transaction-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC. Applies retention: transactions + ledger_entries > 7 years (10 for Enterprise) archived to compliance-storage then hard-deleted. NEVER hard-purges without first archiving — a copy always survives in compliance-storage per SOX 802 + AML retention.

entries.name: transaction-detect-account-threshold-crossings
entries.purpose: Every 30 min. Computes per-account running balances via AccountBalanceCalculator + checks against tenant-configured thresholds (accounts_receivable high watermark, cash low watermark, refunds_owed high watermark). Fires AccountBalanceThresholdCrossed per crossing. Distinct from the nightly reconciler because threshold crossings need faster detection than 24h.

entries.name: transaction-verify-halt-flag-consistency
entries.purpose: Every 10 min. Verifies that every tenant with tenant.transaction_halt_new=true has at least one unresolved LedgerImbalanceDetected in the last 30 days. Detects orphan halt flags (a flag left on after the imbalance was resolved). Ops signal — non-zero orphan count means we're blocking new transactions unnecessarily.
